name: california-monterey
description: Monterey County civic data from official county government websites

config.description: Monterey County civic data from official county government websites

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past Monterey County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('Monterey County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: Monterey County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract Monterey County Board of Supervisors members — name, district number, party affiliation if listed, photo URL, contact info (phone, email, district office address), and profile page link.
hints: Most California counties have 5 supervisors; do not hardcode the count — extract whatever the page lists.
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, name, district, party (optional), photoUrl, detailUrl
Districts are numeric (e.g., "1", "2") — strip any "District" prefix label from extracted values
